source_text:
CONSULTING SERVICES AGREEMENT

This Agreement is entered into as of January 8, 2024 ("Effective Date") by and between:

Client: Meridian Healthcare Group, a Delaware corporation, with principal offices at 789 Medical Center Blvd, Austin, TX 78701 ("Client")

Consultant: NextWave Analytics LLC, an Oregon limited liability company, with principal offices at 321 Data Drive, Portland, OR 97209 ("Consultant")

1. SCOPE OF SERVICES
Consultant shall provide data analytics and machine learning consulting services including:
a) Patient flow optimization modeling
b) Revenue cycle analytics dashboard development
c) Predictive readmission risk scoring
d) Monthly reporting and recommendations

2. TERM
This Agreement shall commence on February 1, 2024 and continue for twelve (12) months through January 31, 2025, unless earlier terminated per Section 7.

3. COMPENSATION
Client shall pay Consultant:
- Monthly retainer: $18,000/month
- Performance bonus: 10% of documented cost savings exceeding $500,000
- Expenses: Reimbursed at cost, pre-approved, capped at $2,500/month
Payment due within 15 days of invoice receipt.

4. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
All work product, deliverables, models, and code created under this Agreement shall be the sole property of Client upon full payment. Consultant retains rights to pre-existing tools and methodologies.

5. CONFIDENTIALITY
Both parties agree to maintain strict confidentiality of proprietary information. HIPAA compliance required for all patient data handling. NDA executed separately.

6. NON-COMPETE
Consultant agrees not to provide substantially similar services to competing healthcare organizations within a 50-mile radius of Client's facilities for 12 months following termination.

7. TERMINATION
Either party may terminate with 30 days written notice. Client may terminate immediately for cause. Upon termination, all unpaid fees for completed work become due.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement:

Client: Dr. Rebecca Torres, CEO, Meridian Healthcare Group
Date: January 8, 2024

Consultant: James Park, Managing Partner, NextWave Analytics LLC
Date: January 8, 2024

term.early_termination: 30 days written notice; immediate for cause

extracted.ip_ownership: Client owns all work product upon full payment; Consultant retains pre-existing tools
extracted.confidentiality: Mutual NDA; HIPAA compliance required for patient data

non_compete.scope: Substantially similar services to competing healthcare organizations

extraction.summary: 12-month consulting agreement between Meridian Healthcare Group and NextWave Analytics LLC for data analytics/ML services at $18,000/month ($216K total). Includes performance bonus, HIPAA compliance, 50-mile non-compete, and client IP ownership. Term: Feb 2024 – Jan 2025.
warnings: Non-compete clause may have enforceability limitations depending on jurisdiction

suggestions: Could flag that total contract value is calculated, not stated
